button.label: Merge Formulas
button.supertip: Selects two related cells and inlines the precedent formula into the dependent, producing a single combined formula. Fully spill-range and dynamic array safe.

button.label: Wrap Formula
button.supertip: Wraps every formula or value in the selection with a pattern you supply. Use [value] as the placeholder for existing cell content - e.g. =IFERROR([value], 0). Remembers the last-used pattern.

button.label: Static Sheet/WB
button.supertip: Permanently replaces all formulas with their current values across the active sheet or the entire workbook. Handles spill ranges correctly.

button.label: Clean Data
button.supertip: Trims spaces and removes non-printable characters for the selected scope (Range, Sheet, or Workbook).

button.label: Break Links
button.supertip: Removes all external workbook references and keeps current values.

button.label: Convert to Dates
button.supertip: Converts text-based date strings in the selected column into proper Excel date values.

button.label: Duplicate Workbook
button.supertip: Creates a copy of this workbook on your desktop for quick sharing.

button.label: Export Range
button.supertip: Exports the selected range (or the full used range if nothing is selected) to your Desktop as a PNG image or a fit-to-page PDF.

button.label: Focus Mode
button.supertip: Hides or restores worksheet chrome to maximise working area.

button.label: Hotkeys
button.supertip: Opens the Beaver keyboard shortcut reference, listing all registered hotkeys and their descriptions.
